## Malformed fixture — formal type missing continuation fields

This MSG is type `task` (a formal type per ADR043 v1.3.0 §13) but is missing
all three required continuation fields:
- `next_step` — MISSING
- `handoff_to` — MISSING
- `handoff_context_pointer` — MISSING

The pre-commit hook must reject this with a clear error referencing ADR043 v1.3.0.
